verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a serine protease synthesized with a signal peptide and secreted constitutively into body fluids and extracellular space. It has no transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or outer-leaflet lipidation. There is no documented covalent or wash-resistant post-translational anchoring to a cell-surface TM partner, and no evidence for cell-state-induced outer-leaflet display or tissue-restricted surface residency. KLK2 remains in equilibrium with the soluble extracellular pool.
